title: rubus × decoratus
intro: Rubus × decoratus, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry species, is a deciduous shrub known for its ornamental value and medicinal properties. The plant contains anthocyanins and other flavonoids that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful for various health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × decoratus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it accessible for topical or internal use.
